===Pokémon Pocket Monsters===
[[File:Falkner PMHGSS.png|thumb|left|140px|Falkner in Pocket Monsters HGSS]]
[[File:Falkner PM.png|thumb|140px|Falkner in Pokémon Pocket Monsters]]
Falkner first appeared in ''[[PM070|The Gym Challenges Begin!!]]'' as the first Gym Leader in Johto {{PPM|Red}} encountered. Red met him in Sprout Tower while talking to one of the Elders. He reappeared in [[PMHGSS05]], where he had a [[rematch]] with Red during the latter's return to Johto.

|desc={{p|Natu}} is Falkner's first known Pokémon. It is [[Walking Pokémon|usually seen on Falkner's shoulder]] when it is not battling. During his battle with {{PPM|Red}} at Sprout Tower, Falkner sends it out to have a battle with his {{TP|Red|Clefairy}}.

Natu's known moves are {{m|Leer}}, {{m|Teleport}}, {{m|Confuse Ray}}, and {{m|Peck}}.}}
